claim: Cameron Mackintosh has extended Hamilton (Victoria Palace), Les Misérables (Sondheim), Phantom of the Opera (His Majesty's) and Oliver! (Gielgud) in London's West End with bookings running until early October 2026.
quote: Les Misérables, The Phantom of the Opera, Oliver! and Hamilton have all extended their bookings to October 2026 ... Hamilton at the Victoria Palace Theatre ... Les Misérables at the Sondheim Theatre ... Phantom at His Majesty's Theatre ... Oliver! at the Gielgud Theatre.

claim: Wicked at the Apollo Victoria Theatre has booking open into 2026 with the show celebrating its 20th West End anniversary on 26-27 September 2026 and Jordan Litz joining the cast from 19 May 2026.
quote: Jordan Litz, the longest-running Fiyero in the history of Wicked, will join the West End cast from 19 May 2026 ... special performances on Saturday 26 and Sunday 27 September 2026.

claim: Stranger Things: The First Shadow plays at the Phoenix Theatre, London with tickets booking through to 6 September 2026 and prices ranging £36–£328.
quote: Stranger Things tickets are priced from £36 to £328 ... Booking until 6 September 2026 ... Phoenix Theatre.

claim: MJ The Musical at the Prince Edward Theatre is booking only until 28 February 2026 (closing date), making early-2026 the last window for the West End production.
quote: MJ The Musical | at Prince Edward Theatre | Closed 28 Feb 2026

claim: The Paris Opera 2025/26 and 2026/27 seasons span Palais Garnier and Opéra Bastille with major productions including Hamlet, Götterdämmerung, Il Barbiere di Siviglia and Black Pearl through autumn 2026.
quote: Hamlet (Opéra Bastille, September 18 - October 9, 2026), Götterdämmerung by Richard Wagner (Opéra Bastille, October 8-18, 2026) ... Il Barbiere di Siviglia ... (Opéra Bastille, September 12 - November 5, 2026).

claim: Paris Accor Arena's 2026 calendar from May onward features Tame Impala (3 May), TWICE (16-17 May), NE-YO & AKON (12 May), Wu-Tang Clan (10 June) and a Lady Gaga return in November.
quote: Tame Impala on May 3, and TWICE on May 16 & 17 ... NE-YO & AKON on May 12 ... Wu-Tang Clan on June 10th, 2026 ... Lady Gaga in November 2026.

claim: L'Olympia Paris hosts intimate-venue highlights in 2026 including Jack White (13-14 June), Ghinzu (14-15 October) and Art Garfunkel (21 October).
quote: Jack White on Saturday, June 13 and Sunday, June 14, 2026 ... Ghinzu on Wednesday, October 14, 2026 ... Art Garfunkel on Wednesday, October 21, 2026.

claim: Andrea Bocelli plays two nights at Amsterdam's Ziggo Dome on 29 and 30 March 2026.
quote: Andrea Bocelli ... Ziggo Dome Amsterdam ... 29 & 30 March 2026.

claim: Amsterdam's Ziggo Dome 2026 lineup includes Eric Clapton (24 April), Pentatonix (26 & 29 April), Tame Impala (4 May), Rüfüs Du Sol (6-7 May), Olivia Dean (9 May), Madison Beer (21 May), Zucchero (29 May) and TWICE (30-31 May).
quote: Eric Clapton on April 24, 2026; Pentatonix on April 26 and 29, 2026; Tame Impala on May 4, 2026; Rüfüs Du Sol on May 6-7, 2026 ... Madison Beer on May 21, 2026; Zucchero on May 29, 2026; and TWICE on May 30-31, 2026.

claim: The Concertgebouw Amsterdam 2025-2026 season features the Wiener Symphoniker performing Mahler's First, Yuja Wang with the Swedish Radio Symphony, Lisa Batiashvili/Capuçon/Thibaudet on Debussy & Dvořák, and the Jussen brothers.
quote: The Wiener Symphoniker, once conducted by Mahler himself, returns under chief conductor Petr Popelka for Mahler's First Symphony ... Star pianist Yuja Wang joins the Swedish Radio Symphony Orchestra for Ravel's Piano Concerto for the Left Hand.

claim: Cologne's Lanxess Arena 2026 lineup includes Rosalía's Lux Tour (29 April), NE-YO & AKON (20 May), TWICE (26 May), DJ BoBo (6 June), Calum Scott (7 June), Tom Jones (14 July) and Lenny Kravitz (29 July).
quote: ROSALÍA: LUX TOUR 2026 on April 29 ... NE-YO & AKON ... May 20 ... TWICE ... May 26 ... DJ BoBo: Tour 2026 on June 6 ... Tom Jones - COME GATHER ROUND 2026 on July 14 ... Lenny Kravitz - Live 2026 on July 29.

claim: The closest big-room option, Zénith de Lille, hosts Les Misérables in concert (23-26 April 2026), Florent Pagny five-night residency (1-6 June), Amel Bent (23 May) and a December run with Disney en Concert and Bigflo et Oli.
quote: Les Misérables will perform five exceptional shows from April 23-26, 2026 ... Florent Pagny will perform five exceptional concerts on June 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 5th, and 6th, 2026 ... Amel Bent is scheduled for May 23, 2026.

claim: From Ghent, Eurostar reaches Paris Gare du Nord via Brussels-Midi (Brussels-Paris in ~1h25, hourly), so total Ghent-Paris is roughly 2h door-to-door; Brussels-Amsterdam runs hourly in ~2h05 and Brussels-Cologne in ~2h14 (5x daily).
quote: Eurostar trains run from Paris Gare du Nord to Antwerp Central (en route to Amsterdam) every hour or two in 2h05, and from Paris Gare du Nord to Liège Guillemins (en route to Cologne) 5 times a day in 2h14 ... Brussels Midi to Paris Gare du Nord ... approximately 1 hour and 25 minutes.
